justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and then accurately understood the request to check for earlier slots on the same day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable, offering clear options for the next two days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent gathering all necessary information and booking the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered when the initial slot was unavailable by checking for other times on the requested day and then offering suitable alternatives without losing context.
